content: As mentioned in a previous community call, our team has an undergrad intern for exploring using Rust in Linux kernel. He's starting this week. I think working with the community is important to the success of his project. What is the best channel for him to engage with the community? Mailing list, Zulip chat or Github?

All of the above :-) They can use:

  • Mailing list for longer discussions of technical strategy
  • Zulip or quick questions or feedback
  • Github for sending PRs and tracking issues
